blue zushi thca flower essential 28g strain profile blue zushi thca flower is a hybrid bred from zkittlez and kush mints . the cross brings the colorful fruit forward bag appeal zkittlez is famous for delivers a balanced euphoric experience that settles into a comfortable body relaxing baseline. the high feels mood lifting without being racy and physically calming without being sedating — making it a popular pick among users seeking steady stress relief or a reliable evening unwind. flavor & aroma on the palate ripe blueberry and tropical fruit up front with a cool minty middle and a sweet slightly creamy finish on the exhale. smoke is smooth and dessert leaning. the terpene profile is limonene forward with a peppery caryophyllene backbone — see the coa for the exact terpene breakdown
